title: 3D Cyber Blades
description: A heart and soul put into the blades, that were made to kill, but used to impress.
body:
Are you **BORED** of the vanilla minecraft swords? 
> Well here is a fix for you! 

> Especially for the **Ghostrunner** and **Cyberpunk** enthusiasts! Sometimes they may contain magical themes, but thats for **astetics**, I promise! The swords are as **optimised** as possible with **INCREDIBLE** **Q**uality put into them! They are even **ANIMATED!!** Check this out!

**To make this kind of quality, you need to put in your heart, and Soul.** and that's what I did. 

# No more work done on it
- I have a new pc, and the old one? broken, any data? gone, lost I am mad and my mental state is not helping. have fun using this pack i guess.

# The part where I tell you about it

= **Can I make content with it?**
> uh, yeah it's free advertisement. Who wouldnt allow such a fun activity! 

= **Okay, but why should I even download this?**
> Well, there's not a lot to go trough. So here's the things that _are_/_will be_ changed! So you can make sure that, this is what you are looking for!

## - models below _are_/_will be_ 3D models -
- вњ…Netherite Sword вњЁвћЎпёЏ
- вњ…Diamond Sword вњЁвћЎпёЏ
- вњ…Gold Sword вњЁ
- вњ…Iron Sword вњЁ
- вњ…Stone Sword вњЁ
- вњ…Wooden Sword вњЁ

## - PBR -

> Yes, I will be making some, emmisive and specular maps are beeing used right now! Download to see them in game, 

> just make sure to use **SEUSPBR**/**LabPBR** to see my custom maps, intergrated **PBR**'s in shaders like **complementary** use their own stuff. Unless I'm mistaken, just to be sure I'm making sure to make this clear!
 
# What can we expect in the next updates? something like 2.0?

> All of the Axe's getting updated.

- вќЊNetherite Axe 
- вќЊDiamond Axe 
- вќЊGold Axe 
- вќЊIron Axe 
- вќЊStone Axe 
- вќЊWooden Axe 

-# вќЊ means it's not yet avaible.
  
-# The вњЁ mean it **GLOWS**.
  
-# The вћЎпёЏ means it's animated!

-# вњ… is, obvious.
